Wei Zhang
Senior Data Analyst — Business Intelligence, New York, NY
wei.zhang@example.com | 555-201-3019 | linkedin.com/in/wei-zhang-analytics

SUMMARY
Senior data analyst with 6 years turning data into decisions for product and
business teams. Strong SQL and BI skills, building dashboards and reporting that
track KPIs and surface actionable insights.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Analyst — Beacon Commerce (2021–present)
- Build and own executive dashboards in Tableau and Looker, tracking revenue,
  retention, and funnel KPIs across the business.
- Write complex SQL to model data from the warehouse, define metrics, and deliver
  self-serve reporting that cut ad-hoc requests 40%.
- Partner with product and operations on A/B test readouts and business
  intelligence analyses that inform roadmap decisions.

Data Analyst — Harborline Retail (2018–2021)
- Built reporting and dashboards in SQL and Excel; analyzed sales and marketing
  performance and automated weekly KPI reporting.

SKILLS
Data analysis, SQL, Tableau, Looker, dashboards, reporting, business
intelligence, KPIs, metrics, Excel, data visualization, ETL, A/B testing, data
warehouse, analytics

EDUCATION
B.S. Statistics & Economics, University of Chicago, 2018
